name: EdwMbrMcareEvtAuditRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte_mins AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS min_RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MBR_MCARE_EVT_AUDIT' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsMbrMcareEvtAuditRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte_mins M ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = M.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = M.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = M.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= M.min_RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.

MODIFICATIONS:

Developer               Date                         Change Description                                                                           Project #          Development Project          Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed  
------------------             ----------------------------     -----------------------------------------------------------------------                                   ----------------         ------------------------------------       ----------------------------      ----------------
Kalyan Neelam         2020-10-05               Original Prgramming                                                                                                    EnterpriseDev2                  Reddy Sanam            2020-10-05

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Mbr Mcare Evt Audit Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
